// -----// IR Dump After HIVMAggregatedDecomposeOp (hivm-aggregated-decompose-op) //----- //

// -----// IR Dump After HIVMAggregatedDecomposeOp (hivm-aggregated-decompose-op) //----- //
func.func @main_mix_aic(%arg0: i64 {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<ffts_base_address>}, %arg1: memref<?xi8, #hivm.address_space<gm>> {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<sync_block_lock>}, %arg2: memref<?xi8, #hivm.address_space<gm>> {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<workspace>}, %arg3: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg4: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg5: memref<?xi32, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg6: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg7: memref<?xf32, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg8: i32, %arg9: i32, %arg10: i32) attributes {SyncBlockLockArgIdx = 0 : i64, WorkspaceArgIdx = 1 : i64, func_dyn_memref_args = dense<[false, true, true, true, true, true, true, true, false, false, false]> : vector<11xi1>, hacc.entry, hacc.function_kind = #hacc.function_kind<DEVICE>, hivm.func_core_type = #hivm.func_core_type<AIC>, hivm.part_of_mix, hivm.storage_aligned, mix_mode = "mix"} {
  %c0_i32 = arith.constant 0 : i32
  %c4_i32 = arith.constant 4 : i32
  %true = arith.constant true

// -----// IR Dump After ReduceRankSubview (hivm-reduce-rank-subview) //----- //
func.func @main_mix_aic(%arg0: i64 {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<ffts_base_address>}, %arg1: memref<?xi8, #hivm.address_space<gm>> {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<sync_block_lock>}, %arg2: memref<?xi8, #hivm.address_space<gm>> {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<workspace>}, %arg3: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg4: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg5: memref<?xi32, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg6: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg7: memref<?xf32, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg8: i32, %arg9: i32, %arg10: i32) attributes {SyncBlockLockArgIdx = 0 : i64, WorkspaceArgIdx = 1 : i64, func_dyn_memref_args = dense<[false, true, true, true, true, true, true, true, false, false, false]> : vector<11xi1>, hacc.entry, hacc.function_kind = #hacc.function_kind<DEVICE>, hivm.func_core_type = #hivm.func_core_type<AIC>, hivm.part_of_mix, hivm.storage_aligned, mix_mode = "mix"} {
  %c0_i32 = arith.constant 0 : i32
  %c4_i32 = arith.constant 4 : i32
  %true = arith.constant true
  %false = arith.constant false
  %c64 = arith.constant 64 : index
  %c1_i32 = arith.constant 1 : i32
  %c16 = arith.constant 16 : index
  hivm.hir.set_ffts_base_addr %arg0
  hivm.hir.set_mask_norm
  %0 = arith.muli %arg8, %arg9 : i32
  %1 = arith.muli %0, %arg10 : i32
  annotation.mark %1 {logical_block_num} : i32
  hivm.hir.set_ffts_base_addr %arg0

// -----// IR Dump After LiftLowestStride (hivm-lift-lowest-stride) //----- //
func.func @main_mix_aic(%arg0: i64 {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<ffts_base_address>}, %arg1: memref<?xi8, #hivm.address_space<gm>> {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<sync_block_lock>}, %arg2: memref<?xi8, #hivm.address_space<gm>> {hacc.arg_type = #hacc.arg_type<workspace>}, %arg3: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg4: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg5: memref<?xi32, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg6: memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg7: memref<?xf32, #hivm.address_space<gm>>, %arg8: i32, %arg9: i32, %arg10: i32) attributes {SyncBlockLockArgIdx = 0 : i64, WorkspaceArgIdx = 1 : i64, func_dyn_memref_args = dense<[false, true, true, true, true, true, true, true, false, false, false]> : vector<11xi1>, hacc.entry, hacc.function_kind = #hacc.function_kind<DEVICE>, hivm.func_core_type = #hivm.func_core_type<AIC>, hivm.part_of_mix, hivm.storage_aligned, mix_mode = "mix"} {
  %c0_i32 = arith.constant 0 : i32
  %c4_i32 = arith.constant 4 : i32
  %true = arith.constant true
  %false = arith.constant false
  %c64 = arith.constant 64 : index
  %c1_i32 = arith.constant 1 : i32
  %c16 = arith.constant 16 : index
  hivm.hir.set_ffts_base_addr %arg0
  hivm.hir.set_mask_norm
  %0 = arith.muli %arg8, %arg9 : i32
  %1 = arith.muli %0, %arg10 : i32
  annotation.mark %1 {logical_block_num} : i32
  hivm.hir.set_ffts_base_addr %arg0
  %reinterpret_cast = memref.reinterpret_cast %arg3 to offset: [0], sizes: [1, 1, 64, 80], strides: [5120, 5120, 80, 1] : memref<?xf16, #hivm.address_space<gm>> to memref<1x1x64x80xf16, strided<[5120, 5120, 80, 1]>, #hivm.address_space<gm>>
  %subview = memref.subview %reinterpret_cast[0, 0, 0, 0] [1, 1, 64, 64] [1, 1, 1, 1] : memref<1x1x64x80xf16, strided<[5120, 5120, 80, 1]>, #hivm.address_space<gm>> to memref<64x64xf16, strided<[80, 1]>, #hivm.address_space<gm>>
  %alloc = memref.alloc() : memref<4x4x16x16xf16, #hivm.address_space<cbuf>>
  %cast = memref.cast %alloc : memref<4x4x16x16xf16, #hivm.address_space<cbuf>> to memref<?x?x?x?xf16, #hivm.address_space<cbuf>>
  hivm.hir.sync_block_set[<CUBE>, <PIPE_MTE2>, <PIPE_S>] flag = 0
  hivm.hir.sync_block_set[<CUBE>, <PIPE_MTE2>, <PIPE_S>] flag = 2

  hivm.hir.sync_block_wait[<VECTOR>, <PIPE_MTE2>, <PIPE_S>] flag = 0

  hivm.hir.sync_block_wait[<VECTOR>, <PIPE_MTE2>, <PIPE_S>] flag = 2

}

  %c2_i64 = arith.constant 2 : i64

  %c0_i64_4 = arith.constant 0 : i64
  %c-1_i64 = arith.constant -1 : i64

  %c0_i64_6 = arith.constant 0 : i64

  %c0_i64_9 = arith.constant 0 : i64
  %c-1_i64_10 = arith.constant -1 : i64

    return
  }
}
